title: who can help me submit the result
content: My account is having problems and my identity authentication is not passing, so I cannot submit predictions. Can a friend team up with me to help me submit predictions? I want to see how my grades are. Thanks

comments.content: You need to submit your code as a notebook alongside the csv per here: under Code Requirements. Your code will run an unseen set of wells and generates its own CSV file which will get scored for the leaderboard.
Have you tried contacting Kaggle support? I also had verification issues and the Support team were great – replied promptly and managed to get things sorted.

replies.content: yes, I contact it, but they haven't reply me yet. Maybe I too hurried, I contact it some hours ago. Thank you
